recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: The Lady in the Van
recommendations.overview: The true story of the relationship between Alan Bennett and the singular Miss Shepherd, a woman of uncertain origins who ‘temporarily’ parked her van in Bennett’s London driveway and proceeded to live there for 15 years.

recommendations.title: The Last 10 Years
recommendations.overview: Twenty-year-old Matsuri Takabayashi learns that she only has ten years to live due to an incurable disease. She decides to not dwell on her life and not to fall in love—until she meets a man named Kazuto Manabe at a school reunion.

recommendations.title: Summer Interlude
recommendations.overview: During a brief summer vacation, a lonely woman recalls her first love thirteen years earlier.

recommendations.title: Stardust Memories
recommendations.overview: While attending a retrospect of his work, a filmmaker recalls his life and his loves: the inspirations for his films.

recommendations.title: The Road Home
recommendations.overview: Prompted by the death of his father and the grief of his mother, a man recalls the story of how they met in flashback.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Saving Face
recommendations.overview: A Chinese-American lesbian and her traditionalist mother are reluctant to go public with secret loves that clash against cultural expectations.
